scripts.lint: oxlint apps/api apps/api-server packages/api-client && oxlint apps/web packages/contracts packages/db-schema packages/ui && oxlint e2e scripts playwright.config.ts
scripts.format: oxfmt apps packages e2e package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json playwright.config.ts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check apps packages e2e package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml turbo.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:design:browser: playwright test e2e/auth-login.spec.ts --grep 'loads the active profile|redirects an anonymous root request|alternative visual profile|input focus visible|dark-mode authentication accessible'
scripts.test:design:browser:production: PLAYWRIGHT_USE_PRODUCTION_BUILD=1 PLAYWRIGHT_PORT=18094 playwright test e2e/auth-login.spec.ts --grep 'loads the active profile|redirects an anonymous root request|alternative visual profile|input focus visible|dark-mode authentication accessible'
scripts.verify:release: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm typecheck:p6:fixture && pnpm test && pnpm test:design:hard && pnpm test:p6:db && pnpm test:xg:db && pnpm build && pnpm test:p6:browser && pnpm test:p6:browser:production && pnpm test:design:browser:production && pnpm test:p3d:browser:production && pnpm test:sigma:browser:production
